message:
✨ Auto-apply Copilot code review suggestions on PRs (#334)

Adds copilot-review-apply.yml workflow that triggers when Copilot code
review agent submits a non-approval review on any PR. It:

1. Extracts all suggestion blocks and general comments from the review
2. Posts a structured @copilot comment telling the coding agent to apply
   every suggestion and address every comment
3. For human-authored PRs, also assigns the Copilot coding agent so it
   can push commits to the PR branch

This closes the loop: auto-qa creates issues → coding agent creates PRs
→ review agent reviews → this workflow applies suggestions → humans only
need to do final review.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
